scope: sworn run --task: real single-slice planner-assist quickstart (direction C) — dispatches the planner role to draft a concrete-AC spec.md, then runs implement+verify over that spec

reachability_artifacts.output:
sworn run --task: planner dispatch would be called
  task:         hello
  planner model: openai/gpt-4o-mini
  verifier model:

reachability_artifacts.output_contains:
--task string
    dispatch planner for a single-slice task and run implement+verify

delivered.description: sworn run --task --dry-run compiles and exits without error
delivered.evidence: go build exit 0; sworn run --task 'hello' --dry-run exits 0; TestTaskDryRunFlagAccepted passes

delivered.description: planner returns valid spec -> spec.md created and implement begins
delivered.evidence: TestTaskRunIntegration_PlannerReturnsValidSpec: mock planner returns valid spec, cmdRunTask creates .sworn/task-runs/<ts>/S01-task/spec.md with ACs, status.json created, git repo initialised

delivered.description: planner output has no ACs -> exit with error message
delivered.evidence: TestTaskRunIntegration_PlannerReturnsNoACs: exit code 2, stderr contains 'planner output contained no acceptance criteria — cannot implement', planner-output.txt saved

delivered.description: implement+verify PASS -> print proof bundle path, exit 0
delivered.evidence: cmdRunTask lines 214-217: on RunSlice success, prints 'proof bundle: <path>' and returns 0

delivered.description: implement+verify FAIL -> print failure reason, exit non-zero, keep artefacts
delivered.evidence: TestTaskRunIntegration_PlannerReturnsValidSpec: RunSlice fails (no verifier model), exit non-zero, spec.md and status.json persisted
sworn run --help output includes '-task string' with description

divergence.internal/git/git.go: Added Config() method needed by task.go for ephemeral git repo setup (user.email/user.name). Declared in spec.md Planned touchpoints and status.json planned_files. Branch() reformatted to multi-line by gofmt — cosmetic only.
